headline: Target Recently Reached a Major Milestone. Is the Stock Finally a Buy?
summary: Target's digital business just hit an all-time high as a percentage of total merchandise sales, showing that the company can hold its own against Amazon and Walmart in an increasingly digital era.

headline: MAC.BID Brings Deep Retail Discounts to El Paso, Texas with Online Auctions Starting at $1
summary: Online retail liquidation company, MAC.BID, announced today the company is opening its 29th warehouse location in El Paso, Texas. Located at 12435 Rojas Drive, MAC.BID will open later this spring and plans to hire approximately 80 new teammates across various roles and functions.

headline: Stephanie Lundquist, Bryan Jordan join Securian Financial Board of Directors
summary: ST. PAUL, Minn., April 06, 2026--Securian Financial today announced the elections of Stephanie Lundquist and D. Bryan Jordan to its board of directors, further strengthening the company’s governance with two accomplished leaders who bring deep expertise in human capital strategy, financial services and corporate leadership. They assumed their director roles on April 1, 2026.

headline: Walmart Marketplace Gains Traction: What Does it Mean for Margins?
summary: WMT's marketplace sales jump about 20% as seller participation and fulfillment-service adoption rise, boosting margins via less inventory, more ads and memberships.
